title: A Retrieval-Augmented Financial Advisory Prototype with Evidence-Gated Response Generation
author: Khadka, Shaurav
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This technical preprint documents an individual prototype for retrieval-augmented financial question answering. The prototype combines document ingestion, text normalisation, embedding-based retrieval, vector indexing, prompt construction, response generation, and answer-level evidence gating. The objective is not to provide financial advice or to claim deployment readiness. The objective is to specify a reproducible architecture for reducing unsupported answers in high-risk advisory interfaces. The manuscript contributes a modular system design, a risk taxonomy for financial RAG failure modes, an evaluation protocol separating retrieval quality from generation quality, and a claim-calibration procedure that forces responses to cite retrieved evidence, abstain when evidence is weak, or escalate when the user query exceeds the prototype boundary. The report is intentionally conservative: it treats the system as a research prototype and defines the evidence required before stronger claims could be made.
